name: Régulateur Lattice
description: Contrôleur de grille anti-émeute géant. Ses ondes de suppression neutralisent toute résistance dans un rayon large, réduisant les rebelles en drones dociles.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark cyberpunk, L'Omni-Réseau faction. Massive crowd-control suppression walker, 4-story tall dark grey rectangular platform with enormous dish arrays and emitters on top, visible sonic/neural suppression waves rippling outward in concentric blue rings, people below collapsing to knees. Human skulls as emitter nodes across surface. Barcode serials, dystopian mass control. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
